overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist riding a mechanical mount through diverse mountain terrain. The journey transitions from rocky foothills through a misty forest and up to snow-covered peaks during a golden sunset, showcasing the game's detailed environments and dynamic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with red vegetation patches

agents.ego_description: riding mechanical mount along winding rocky path at steady pace

entered.detail: steep gray rock wall lining the left side of the trail
tall coniferous trees dotting the right hillside
snow-capped mountain visible in the far distance
clusters of red vegetation along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rocky mountain trail during golden hour, with the character riding a mechanical mount that emits blue light from its feet. The path winds between a steep cliff face on the left and scattered pine trees on the right, with patches of distinctive red foliage visible along the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty coniferous forest with low visibility

events.description: entering dense foggy forest with significantly reduced visibility and diffused lighting

agents.ego_description: navigating mechanical mount through narrow misty forest trail

entered.detail: dense wall of tall pine trees creating forest boundary
forest floor covered with moss and small rocks

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts dramatically as the rider enters a dense foggy forest where tall pines block the sky and mist reduces visibility. The trail becomes darker and more enclosed, with moss-covered ground replacing the rocky terrain, creating an atmospheric transition from the open foothills.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep cliffside ascent with golden hour lighting

events.description: exiting fog into open cliffside with clear golden hour lighting and panoramic views
mount accelerates to gallop up steep incline with increased speed

agents.ego_description: climbing steep rocky terrain on mechanical mount at increasing speed along cliff edge

entered.detail: sheer rock wall rising vertically beside the narrow path
layer of mist visible in the valley below the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: Breaking out of the forest fog, the scene opens onto an exposed cliffside bathed in warm golden hour light. The path climbs steeply along a granite cliff face with fog-filled valleys visible below, and the mechanical mount accelerates to navigate the rugged ascending terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain summit with tribal hut

events.description: ground surface transitions from rock to deep snow as elevation increases
passing primitive wooden hut built into cliffside with colorful tribal decorations

agents.ego_description: traversing snowy ridge line and pausing to survey distant landscape and ruins

entered.detail: deep snow covering the mountain path and surrounding terrain
small rustic structure with thatched roof and purple tribal markings built into rock
ancient stone ruins visible on distant mountain peaks

segments.scene_description: The final segment reaches a snow-covered mountain summit with panoramic views of distant peaks and valleys. The rider passes a primitive wooden hut with tribal decorations built into the cliffside, traversing deep snow while ancient ruins become visible on far mountain tops under the colorful sunset sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a rocky mountain trail through a misty forest and up to a snow-covered summit during a golden sunset. It begins on a winding path between a steep cliff and scattered pine trees, where a mechanical mount emits blue light as it passes patches of red foliage. As the rider moves forward, the environment shifts into a dense, foggy forest where tall pines and moss-covered ground create a dark, enclosed atmosphere. The scene then opens onto an exposed granite cliffside bathed in warm light, with the mount accelerating upward above fog-filled valleys. Finally, the path reaches a snowy peak, passing a decorated tribal hut and revealing ancient ruins on distant mountain tops under a colorful sky.
